Uses of Annotation Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Marshalled

Packages that use Marshalled
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.atom
ATOM Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.html5
HTML5 Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch
Juneau @Marshalled types for JSON Patch (RFC 6902).
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp
Juneau @Marshalled types for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
Juneau @Marshalled beans for RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs (media type application/problem+json).
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.response
HTTP Response Exception Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.

  • Uses of Marshalled in org.apache.juneau.bean.atom

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.atom with annotations of type Marshalled
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Category
    Represents a category or tag associated with a feed or entry.
    class 
    Entry
    Represents an individual entry within an Atom feed or as a standalone Atom document.
    class 
    Feed
    Represents a top-level Atom feed document.
    class 
    Generator
    Identifies the software agent used to generate an Atom feed.
    class 
    Icon
    Represents a small icon image for visual identification of a feed.
    class 
    Id
    Represents a permanent, universally unique identifier for a feed or entry.
    class 
    Link
    Represents a reference from an entry or feed to a Web resource.
    class 
    Logo
    Represents a larger logo image for visual identification of a feed.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.hal with annotations of type Marshalled
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HalLink
    Represents a HAL Link Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 5.
    class 
    HalResource
    Represents a HAL Resource Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 4.

  • Uses of Marshalled in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi with annotations of type Marshalled
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonApiDocument
    Represents the top-level JSON:API document as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Document Structure.
    class 
    JsonApiError
    Represents a JSON:API Error Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Error Objects.
    class 
    JsonApiErrorSource
    Represents the source sub-object of a JSON:API Error Object.
    class 
    JsonApiLink
    Represents a JSON:API Link Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Links.
    class 
    JsonApiRelationship
    Represents a JSON:API Relationship Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Relationships.
    class 
    JsonApiResource
    Represents a JSON:API Resource Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Objects.
    class 
    JsonApiResourceIdentifier
    Represents a JSON:API Resource Identifier Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Identifier Objects.
    class 
    JsonApiVersion
    Represents the JSON:API top-level jsonapi member.

  • Uses of Marshalled in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch with annotations of type Marshalled
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AddOp
    The JSON Patch "add" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.1.
    class 
    CopyOp
    The JSON Patch "copy" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.5.
    class 
    JsonPatchOperation
    Abstract base for a JSON Patch operation per RFC 6902.
    class 
    MoveOp
    The JSON Patch "move" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.4.
    class 
    RemoveOp
    The JSON Patch "remove" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.2.
    class 
    ReplaceOp
    The JSON Patch "replace" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.3.
    class 
    TestOp
    The JSON Patch "test" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.6.

    Description

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp with annotations of type Marshalled
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BlobResourceContents
    Base64 blob body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
    class 
    CallToolRequest
    Parameters for "tools/call".
    class 
    CallToolResult
    Result payload for "tools/call".
    class 
    ClientCapabilities
    MCP client capability advertisement in InitializeRequest.
    interface 
    Content
    Polymorphic MCP content block (tool results, prompt messages).
    class 
    EmbeddedResourceContent
    MCP resource content block (inline resource body).
    class 
    GetPromptRequest
    Parameters for "prompts/get".
    class 
    GetPromptResult
    Result payload for "prompts/get".
    class 
    ImageContent
    MCP image content block (base64 data).
    class 
    Implementation
    MCP Implementation object (name / version).
    class 
    InitializeRequest
    MCP initialize request parameters.
    class 
    InitializeResult
    MCP initialize result payload.
    class 
    JsonRpcError
    JSON-RPC 2.0 error object.
    class 
    JsonRpcRequest
    JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope.
    class 
    JsonRpcResponse
    JSON-RPC 2.0 success or error response envelope.
    class 
    JsonSchema
    JSON Schema subset used by MCP tool inputSchema objects.
    class 
    ListPromptsResult
    Result payload for "prompts/list".
    class 
    ListResourcesResult
    Result payload for "resources/list".
    class 
    ListToolsResult
    Result payload for "tools/list".
    class 
    LoggingCapability
    Server logging capability marker (structure may grow with the spec).
    class 
    McpException
    Runtime exception carrying JSON-RPC error fields for mapping to JsonRpcError.
    class 
    Prompt
    MCP prompt descriptor (prompts/list entry).
    class 
    PromptArgument
    Declared argument for an MCP prompt.
    class 
    PromptCapability
    Server capability flags for prompts.
    class 
    PromptMessage
    Single message line inside GetPromptResult.
    class 
    ReadResourceRequest
    Parameters for "resources/read".
    class 
    ReadResourceResult
    Result payload for "resources/read".
    class 
    Resource
    MCP resource descriptor (resources/list entry).
    class 
    ResourceCapability
    Server capability flags for resources.
    interface 
    ResourceContents
    Polymorphic MCP resource body (text or base64 blob).
    class 
    RootsCapability
    Client roots capability.
    class 
    ServerCapabilities
    MCP server capability advertisement in InitializeResult.
    class 
    TextContent
    MCP text content block.
    class 
    TextResourceContents
    Text body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
    class 
    Tool
    MCP tool descriptor (tools/list entry).
    class 
    ToolCapability
    Server capability flags for tools.

    Method
    Description

    Method
    Description
